specs.title: login page loads with correct branding
email and password fields are present and functional
submit button exists with "Sign In" text
invalid credentials show error message
valid login redirects to /dashboard
auth persists across navigation
logout or session check
dashboard page loads after login
KPI cards are visible
navigation navbar has all expected links
page does not have console errors
charts/graphs section loads
clients page loads at /clients
"Add Client" button is visible
search input is present and filters client cards
invoice type filter pills are present
status filter pills are present
client cards display expected elements
pagination works if clients > 18

annotations.description: Only 12 clients found, fewer than 18 - pagination not expected
Only 12 clients found, fewer than 18 - pagination not expected

specs.title: clicking "Add Client" opens modal with title "Add New Client"
invoice type selection has 3 options
GST type is selected by default
fill GST client form and GSTIN field appears for GST type
fill complete GST client form and submit
new GST client appears in client list
open Add Client modal
select "International" type and GSTIN field should NOT appear
currency dropdown shows USD option
region dropdown shows USA
fill international client form and submit
new international client appears in client list
should open new invoice modal from invoices page
should create a GST invoice with correct calculations
should verify GST calculation formula: subtotal + 18% tax = total
should create an international invoice with 0% tax
should verify international calculation formula: subtotal + 0% tax = subtotal
should create a non-GST invoice with 0% tax
should verify non-GST calculation formula: subtotal + 0% = subtotal
should navigate to invoices page and see invoice list
should click on first invoice and view detail page
should display line items table with description, quantity, and amount columns
should display subtotal, tax, and total
should show Record Payment button or area
should show invoice actions: PDF, Send, Edit
should calculate single item: qty=1, amount=10000 -> subtotal=10000
should calculate multiple items: qty=1 amt=10000 + qty=2 amt=5000 -> subtotal=20000
should handle zero quantity without breaking calculation
should handle large numbers: amount=999999, qty=10 -> subtotal=9999990
should verify rounding to 2 decimal places
should verify calculation consistency across all invoice types
navigate to /payments and page loads
page loads with payment tracking UI
check for payment list or table presence
verify filtering capabilities exist
check for payment method indicators
check for TDS column or data if applicable
navigate to /expenses and page loads
expenses page renders without error
check for Upload bank statement button or link at /expenses/upload
